channel.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports
channel.description: Capitalist ME offers global news, in-depth coverage on business, politics, finance, culture, sports, and the latest world events. Stay informed on key issues

image.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports

item.title: Harry Kane’s Late Heroics Rescue England vs DR Congo
item.description:
Harry Kane scored twice in the final minutes to rescue England from a shock defeat against DR Congo, securing a 2–1 victory and a place in the World Cup last 16.

Key points:
• DR Congo struck first after Brian Cipenga capitalised on England’s defensive lapse
• England struggled for rhythm and penetration as DR Congo’s high press disrupted midfield play
• Harry Kane scored twice in the final minutes to complete a dramatic comeback
• Thomas Tuchel’s tactical adjustments and substitutions helped England overturn the deficit

Read the full article: Harry Kane’s Late Heroics Rescue England vs DR Congo
